entry.title: NAIF Mineral Sunscreen Spray SPF50 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Suncreen
Price: 24.90

Naif Mineral Sunscreen Spray SPF50 is developed for the sensitive skin with a reef-friendly formula and is suitable for the whole family. The zinc oxide based UV filter protects the skin immediately against UVA and UVB with minimum risk of skin irritation. The convenient spray makes for a quick and easy application.

  • High protection of sensitive skin with mineral UV filter
  • Protects immediately against UVA and UVB radiation
  • Water-resistant: Enjoy the water safely
  • Reef-friendly: no oxybenzone, octinoxate, and octocrylene
  • In convenient spray, so easy and quick to apply to the skin

How to use: Shake the spray before use. Apply a generous amount to the body and face before you go in the sun. Reapply every two hours and after swimming for optimum protection. Do not keep product in the sun.

Ingredients: Decyl Oleate, Zinc Oxide, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Alcohol, Triheptanoin, Parfum/Fragrance, Polyhydroxystearic Acid, Allantoin, Tocopherol, Aqua/Water, Silica Dimethyl Silylate, Pongamol, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Bisabolol, Denatonium Benzoate

Bottle made from bioplastic

entry.title: NAIF Cooling Aftersun 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Suncreen
Price: 13.90

Naïf Cooling After Sun Gel soothes, moisturizes and restores the skin after a sunny day. Aloe Vera provides cooling and regeneration, glycerine for hydration. This keeps even the most sensitive skin soft and supple. Just what the skin needs after exposure to UV rays. Also nice: absorbs quickly and doesn't leave a sticky layer.

How to use: Apply generously after exposure to the sun. Especially on the areas that have had a lot of sun. Repeat if skin still feels dry.

Tip: Keep the gel in the refrigerator, so it is extra cooling.

Ingredients: Aqua/Water, Glycerin, Methylpropanediol, Cetearyl Alcohol, Cetyl Alcohol, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Parfum/Fragrance, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice Powder, Allantoin, Caprylyl Glycol, Phenylpropanol, Xanthan Gum, Lactic Acid, Sodium Hydroxide

All Naïf products are vegan, made with a mild fragrance and dermatologically tested, without the 26 most common allergens. They also do not contain SLES or microplastics. The tubes are made from sugar cane-based bioplastic.

entry.title: NAIF Lotion Baby Wipes 54pcs
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Baby Wipes
Price: 3.95

Naïf plastic-free lotion wipes are everything you would expect from a baby wipe: strong, well moisturized, with ingredients that take good care of the sensitive baby skin. Does not include polyester fibers and microplastics. Also suitable as a nose cleaner.

By using extra (vegetable) glycerin, aloe vera and bamboo for extra hydration and prematurely soothing red baby bottoms. The lotion has been dermatologically tested and does not contain alcohol, perfume or other ingredients that can cause red baby's buttocks.

How to use: While changing, open the package with one hand, holding your baby with the other. Wipe the area well and don't forget the folds. When finished, close the package tightly to prevent dehydration.

Ingredients: Aqua, Glycerin, Bambusa Arundinacea Stem (Bamboo) Extract, Sodium Cocoyl Glutamate, Levulinic Acid, Aloe Barbadensis (Aloe Vera) Leaf Juice Powder, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid

entry.title: NAIF Mineral Sunscreen SPF30 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Suncreen
Price: 22.90

Mineral Sunscreen SPF30 is sunscreen suitable for the whole family. The zinc oxide based UV filter protects the skin immediately with minimum risk of skin irritation.

The zinc oxide based UV filter adds a protective layer on top of the skin which reflects the sunbeams. This results in immediate effectiveness against UVA and UVB radiation. The added natural oils make application easy.

  • Protects immediately against UVA and UVB radiation for all skin types
  • Water-resistant formula
  • Dermatologically tested

How to use: Shake before use! Apply a generous amount of sunscreen evenly to the body and face before you go out in the sun. This sunscreen offers immediate protection! Reapply every two hours and after swimming for optimal protection.

Be aware that zinc oxide, the sun and water can have a dehydrating effect on the skin. Make sure to rehydrate the skin with an after sun or a nourishing cream after a day in the sun.

 Do not keep product in the sun.

Ingredients: Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Decyl Oleate, Zinc Oxide, Hydrogenated Vegetable Oil, Caprylic/Capric/Myristic/Stearic Triglyceride, Dextrin Palmitate, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Triheptanoin, Ricinus Communis Seed Oil, Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenyl Triazine, Cocos Nucifera Oil, Polyhydroxystearic Acid, Parfum/Fragrance, Allantoin, Tocopherol, Palmitic Acid, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Oryzanol, Bisabolol, Pongamo

Tube made from recycled plastic

entry.title: NAIF Mineral Sunscreen Stick 0% Perfume for Baby & Kids SPF50 36g
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Suncreen
Price: 14.90

Mineral Sunscreen Stick SPF50 is a sunscreen for Baby & Kids. The zinc oxide based UV filter protects the skin immediately with minimum risk of skin irritation. Easy to take and to apply, even by kids who want to do everything themselves. Without added perfume and suitable for sensitive skin.

The sunscreen contains zinc-oxide: a natural ingredient that adds a protective layer on top of the skin which reflects sunbeams. This results in immediate effectiveness against UVA and UVB radiation.

  • Protects immediately against UVA and UVB radiation for baby- and kids skin
  • Water-resistant formula
  • Dermatologically tested, 0% perfume for extra sensitive skin

How to use: Apply a generous amount to the body and face before your kids go in the sun. Make sure to spread it well. Reapply every two hours and after swimming for maximum protection

Ingredients: Caprylic/Capric/Myristic/Stearic Triglyceride, Zinc Oxide, Helianthus Annuus Seed Cera, Hydrogenated Rapeseed Oil, Tocopherol, Pongamol, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Ascorbyl Palmitate

Tube made from recycled plastic

entry.title: NAIF Mineral Sunscreen 0% Perfume for Baby & Kids SPF50 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Suncreen
Price: 22.90

Mineral Sunscreen SPF50 is sunscreen for Baby & Kids. The zinc oxide based UV filter protects the skin immediately with minimum risk of skin irritation. 

The sunscreen contains zinc-oxide: a natural ingredient that adds a protective layer on top of the skin which reflects sunbeams. The sunscreen also does not contain added perfume, which makes it suitable for even the most sensitive skin. This results in immediate effectiveness against UVA and UVB radiation. The added natural oils make application easy and hydrates the skin.

  • Protects immediately against UVA and UVB radiation for baby- and kids skin
  • Water-resistant formula
  • Dermatologically tested, 0% perfume for extra sensitive skin

How to use: Shake the sunscreen before use. Apply a generous amount evenly to the body and face before your kids go in the sun. Reapply every two hours and after swimming for optimum protection. Do not keep product in the sun.

Ingredients: Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Decyl Oleate, Zinc Oxide, Hydrogenated Vegetable Oil, Caprylic/Capric/Myristic/Stearic Triglyceride, Dextrin Palmitate, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Triheptanoin, Ricinus Communis Seed Oil, Bis-Ethylhexyloxyphenol Methoxyphenyl Triazine, Cocos Nucifera Oil, Polyhydroxystearic Acid, Allantoin, Tocopherol, Palmitic Acid, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Oryzanol, Bisabolol, Pongamol

Tube made from recycled plastic

entry.title: NAIF Soothing Baby Oil for Baby & Kids 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Lotion
Price: 14.90

A nice oil that nourishes the skin, absorbs quickly and is not sticky. Use it to create a warm bonding moment with your baby during a massage. Nourishes and hydrates sensitive baby skin after bath time.

By adding sunflower seed oil and cottonseed oil the Naïf Baby Oil helps to lock in moisture post-bath time, so the skin doesn’t get dry and the natural protective layer of your baby’s skin stays intact. 

How to use: Use a few drops on the skin or in the hand and gently massage the oil in circular motions. Absorbs quickly.

Ingredients: Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Parfum/fragrance, Tocopherol, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Gossypium (Cotton Seed) Oil, Bisabolol

entry.title: NAIF Nurturing Night Cream 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Night Cream
Price: 23.90

Naïf Nurturing Night Cream contributes to a good night's sleep. The regenerating night cream soothes the skin and supports the natural skin process. Includes almond oil, shea butter and macadamia extract for ultimate hydration and moisture retention. No more dry spots!

The cream absorbs quickly, doesn't stick and doesn't make the skin feel tight. So you don't have to worry when resting your head on your pillow. The night cream is made without mineral oils, microplastics and silicones.

The Naïf regenerating night cream is for every skin type. So also for the most sensitive skin. All Naïf products are vegan, made with a gentle fragrance, are dermatologically tested and do not contain the 26 most common allergens.

How to use: A night cream is best applied if you apply a good, thick amount. Do this on clean, cleansed skin. And don't forget to apply it to the neck and décolleté. 

Ingredients: Aqua/ Water, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Oil, Glycerin, Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Oil, Macadamia Integrifolia Seed Oil, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Methylpropanediol, Linum Usitatissimum (Linseed) Seed Oil, Cetearyl Alcohol, Cetyl Alcohol, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Sucrose Stearate, Tocopherol, Helianthus Annuus, (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Xanthan Gum, Caprylyl Glycol, Phenylpropanol, Parfum/Fragrance, Citric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide

Tube made from recycled plastic

entry.title: NAIF Nurturing Day Cream 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Day Cream
Price: 23.90

The multitasking Naïf Nurturing Day Cream hydrates and protects face, neck and décolleté during the day from the harmful effects of UV radiation. Al this thanks to the added tomato extract. To support the natural skin process, the day cream contains natural oils, such as avocado and almond oil.

The day cream is quickly absorbed and you don't need much of it. That's why you'll be able to use the bioplastic tube's content even longer. All Naïf products are vegan, made with a gentle fragrance, are dermatologically tested and do not contain the 26 most common allergens.

How to use: Apply the Nurturing Day Cream evenly (you don't need much) to a cleansed face, neck and décolleté.

The natural SPF6 from tomato extract provides for protection against harmful UV rays.

Ingredients: Aqua/Water, Glycerin, Methylpropanediol, Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Oil, Cetearyl Alcohol, Macadamia Integrifolia Seed Oil, Cetyl Alcohol, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Oil, Prunus Armeniaca (Apricot) Kernel Oil, Sucrose Stearate, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Linum Usitatissimum (Linseed Seed) Oil, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Solanum Lycopersicum (Tomato Fruit/Leaf/Stem) Extract, Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary Leaf) Extract, Tocopherol, Caprylyl Glycol, Phenylpropanol, Xanthan Gum, Parfum/Fragrance, Citric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide

Tube made from recycled plastic

entry.title: NAIF Milky Bath Oil for Baby & Kids 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Bath Oil
Price: 14.90

A bath oil that takes care of your baby’s skin from the first bath onwards and softens the bath water. Gently cleanses and moisturizes your (newborn) baby's skin.

Naïf Bath Oil does not contain microplastics, mineral oils and parabens. Includes linseed oil: hydrating and suitable for sensitive skin and 100% natural.

How to use: Fill the baby bath and add about 10 ml (a few drops) of bath oil to the bath water. Mix for a moment so that the oil is evenly distributed. For some extra care, apply a baby oil after washing your baby.

Ingredients: Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Glyceryl Caprylate, Polyglyceryl-3 Palmitate, Parfum/fragrance, Gossypium Herbaceum (Cotton) Seed Oil, Tocopherol, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Bisabolol

entry.title: NAIF Cleansing Face Wash 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Face Cleansing
Price: 13.90

The gel transforms into a milky formula on contact with water. The advantage of this gel-to-milk formula is that it cleanses the skin without drying it out. Therefore, this face cleanser is suitable for all skin types, even for very oily or sensitive skin and the thinner skin around the eyes.

Because the facial cleanser contains natural oils, the skin's PH level remains undisturbed and the skin feels moisturized and supple afterward.

All Naïf products are vegan, made with a gentle fragrance, are dermatologically tested, and do not contain the 26 most common allergens.

How to use: Moisten the face with lukewarm water. Apply a fingertip-sized amount of gel to a (washable) cotton pad or in the palm of your hand and massage the gel all over your face. The gel will now have a milky texture and slowly foams. After cleansing, rinse with lukewarm water, pat skin dry and apply a nourishing day or night cream. 

Ingredients: Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Glycerin, Aqua/Water, Linum Usitatissimum Seed Oil, Sucrose Palmitate, Parfum/Fragrance, Caprylyl Glycol, Tocopherol

Tube made from recycled plastic

entry.title: NAIF Circular Face Scrub 50ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Facial Scrub
Price: 16.90

Naïf Circular Face Scrub cleanses your skin and removes dead skin cells, stimulating cell renewal. Result: radiant skin. The face scrub also contains natural oils, such as macadamia, avocado and sweet almond oil. These ingredients condition your skin and keep your skin soft and supple, without making your face feel tight, after exfoliating.

All Naïf products are 100% vegan, made with a gentle fragrance and are dermatologically tested, free from the 26 most common allergens. Mild for the skin, due to the fine grain, which also allows you to use the scrub several times a week.

How to use: Scrub your face once or twice a week for beautiful, healthy skin. Slightly moisten your face and apply the pea-sized scrub to the inside of your hand. Using your fingers, massage the scrub onto your face for at least 30 seconds using circular motions. Rinse with lukewarm water. 

Ingredients: Aqua, Calcium Carbonate, Macadamia Integrifolia Seed Oil, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis Oil, Persea Gratissima Oil, Methylpropanediol, Cetyl Alcohol, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glycerin, Sucrose Stearate, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Linum Usitatissimum Oil, Caprylyl Glycol, Parfum, Xanthan Gum, Tocopherol, Phenylpropanol, Bisabolol, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Citric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide

Tube made from recycled plastic

entry.title: NAIF Relaxing Bath Foam for Baby & Kids 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Bath Foam
Price: 6.90

Worry-free fun in the bath with lots of bubbles made with natural ingredients. Naif Relaxing Bath Foam for Baby & Kids nurtures, cleanses mildly, hydrates and promises plenty of fun.

  • Bath foam with natural derivatives from coconut oil
  • Cleanses and hydrates the skin while bathing
  • Does not contain microplastics, mineral oils, SLES

How to use: Fill the bath and add a dash of bath foam to the bath water. Mix until you see the first bubbles appear.

Ingredients: Aqua, Sodium Coco-Sulfate, Coco-Glucoside, Glycerin, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Parfum, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Gossypium Herbaceum Seed Extract, Glyceryl Oleat, Tocopherol, Hydrogenated Palm Glycerides Citrate, Sodium Levulinate, Sodium Anisate, Sodium Chloride, Glycol Distearate, Citric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide

Tube/bottle made from recycled plastic

entry.title: NAIF Relaxing Bath Foam for Baby & Kids 500ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Bath Foam
Price: 15.50

Worry-free fun in the bath with lots of bubbles made with natural ingredients. Naif Relaxing Bath Foam for Baby & Kids nurtures, cleanses mildly, hydrates and promises plenty of fun.

  • Bath foam with natural derivatives from coconut oil
  • Cleanses and hydrates the skin while bathing
  • Does not contain microplastics, mineral oils, SLES

How to use: Fill the bath and add a dash of bath foam to the bath water. Mix until you see the first bubbles appear.

Ingredients: Aqua, Sodium Coco-Sulfate, Coco-Glucoside, Glycerin, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Parfum, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Gossypium Herbaceum Seed Extract, Glyceryl Oleat, Tocopherol, Hydrogenated Palm Glycerides Citrate, Sodium Levulinate, Sodium Anisate, Sodium Chloride, Glycol Distearate, Citric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide

Tube/bottle made from recycled plastic

entry.title: NAIF Baby Balm 75ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Baby Care
Price: 16.90

A multi-purpose balm to give dry skin some extra love. This balm with natural ingredients supports and protects the skin barrier. 

Naïf Baby Balm 0% Perfume is a multi-purpose balm that forms a protective layer on dry (baby) skin which helps keep the moisture in. The balm softens skin and keeps it supple without completely closing off. Use it for dry cheeks or hands, chapped lips, sore nipples post-breastfeeding. 

  • Balm with natural ingredients for extra dry baby skin
  • Soothes and restores the very youngest skin and supports the skin barrier
  • No animal fats, microplastics and mineral oils
  • 0% perfume

How to use: Apply a small amount of salve, suitable for both face and body.

Ingredients: Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Sorbitan Olivate, Tribehenin, Simmondsia Chinensis (Jojoba) Seed Oil, Macadamia Integrifolia Seed Oil, Calendula Officinalis Flower Extract, Carica Papaya (Papaya) Fruit Extract, Chamomilla Recutita (Matricaria) Flower Extract, Helianthus Annuus Hybrid (Sunflower Seed) Oil, Tocopherol, Citric Acid

entry.title: NAIF Nurturing Baby Cream 75ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Baby Care
Price: 13.90

Nurturing Cream is a hydrating cream for Baby & Kids. The cream nourishes dry and sensitive skin. With the help of sweet almond oil, avocado oil and macadamia oil the nurturing cream takes care of dry and sensitive skin and gives it some extra love. Suitable for body and face.
  • Made with the best natural ingredients like sweet almond oil
  • For use on face and body
  • No microplastics and mineral oils
  • Dermatologically tested

How to use: Apply a small amount of nurturing cream, suitable for both face and body.

Ingredients: Aqua/Water, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Oil, Macadamia Integrifolia Seed Oil, Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Oil, Glycerin, Gossypium Herbaceum (Cotton) Seed Oil, Cetyl Alcohol, Cetearyl Alcohol, Sucrose Stearate, Glyceryl Stearate Citrate, Phenethyl Alcohol, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Bisabolol, Xanthan Gum, Tocopherol, Caprylyl Glycol, Propanediol, Citric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide

Tube made from recycled plastic

entry.title: NAIF Zinc Diaper Cream 75ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Baby Care
Price: 12.50

A zinc cream for Baby & Kids. Helps with and prevents diaper rash. No perfume added and suitable for damaged skin. Zinc dehydrates the skin, which is exactly what is needed to prevent or take care of diaper rash. Diapers prevent the air from circulating, resulting in wet and soft skin. This combined with pee and poo makes the skin extra sensitive to irritation and rashes.
  • Baby diaper cream with natural ingredients like zinc oxide, camomile and vitamin E
  • Soothes and repairs skin irritations and diaper rash
  • Use also for diaper rash prevention, after every diaper change

How to use: Open the tube with one hand. Apply a small amount to the dry and clean baby bum. Spread lightly. 

Ingredients: Aqua/Water, Zinc Oxide, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Sorbitan Olivate, Polyglyceryl-2 Dipolyhydroxystearate, Glycerin, Magnesium Sulfate, Phenethyl Alcohol, Prunus Amygdalus Dulcis (Sweet Almond) Oil, Persea Gratissima (Avocado) Oil, Macadamia Integrifolia Seed Oil, Gossypium Herbaceum (Cotton) Seed Oil, Tocopherol, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Bisabolol, Hydrogenated Castor Oil, Caprylyl Glycol, Propanediol, Lactic Acid, Sodium Hydroxide

Tube made from recycled plastic

entry.title: NAIF Cleansing Wash Gel 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Body Wash
Price: 10.90

Naïf cleansing wash gel for baby & kids cleanses the skin mildly and prevents dry skin.

  • Washing gel for bath and shower
  • Cleanses and cares for the sensitive baby skin with natural oils
  • 0% SLES
  • Without microplastics and mineral oils

How to use: Apply a small amount to the baby's skin. Rinse off and dry. 

Ingredients: Aqua/Water, Coco-Glucoside (cloudy liquid derived from coconut), Sodium Coco-Sulfate (made from the fatty acids of coconut oil), Cocamidopropyl Betaine (naturally-derived surfactant that is sourced from coconut oil), Glycerin, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Gossypium Hirsutum (Cotton Seed) Extract, Glyceryl Oleate, Tocopherol, Hydrogenated Palm Glycerides Citrate, Sodium Levulinate, Sodium Anisate, Sodium Chloride, Fragrance (allergen-free), Citric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide

Tube made from recycled plastic

entry.title: NAIF Easy Styling Hair Lotion for Baby & Kids 150ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Conditioner
Price: 14.90

A hair lotion to tame and take care of wild kids hair. Naïf's Easy Styling Hair Lotion makes combing easier and reduces tangles and frizz for all hair types. 

  • Hair lotion with natural ingredients that doesn't make the hair greasy
  • Softens knots and tangles in the hair and reduces frizz in curls
  • Can also be used with cradle cap
  • For use on babies and children, for all hairtypes
  • Does not contain microplastics, mineral oils, SLES or silicones

How to use: Spray on towel-dried hair from 30 cm away. Massage gently, comb through the hair and style. Suitable for daily use.

Ingredients: Aqua/Water, Methylpropanediol, Caprylyl/Capryl Glucoside, Glycerin, Gossypium Hirsutum (Cotton Seed) Extract, Caprylyl Glycol, Phenylpropanol, Inulin, Betaine, Sodium Cocoyl Glutamate, Glyceryl Caprylate, Polyglyceryl-6 Oleate, Sodium Surfactin, Parfum/Fragrance (allergen-free), Lactic Acid, Citric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide

Bottle made from recycled plastic

entry.title: NAIF Softening Conditioner for Kids 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Conditioner
Price: 11.90

Curly hair, coarse hair, thick hair - Naïf's Kids Conditioner nourishes and softens the hair of our little ones and makes it easy to comb through. Thanks to the addition of cottonseed oil, the hair is not only cared for, but also frizz-free. Suitable for all hair types.

Removes tangles and moisturizes the hair with sunflower and linseed oil. No SLES and microplastics. 

Mild and fruity fragrance - developed by and for kids.

How to use: Use the conditioner after shampoo and apply from the ends only. Let it sit and rinse! You can use the conditioner after every wash.

Ingredients: Aqua/Water, Cetearyl Alcohol, Glycerin, Glyceryl Stearate SE, Distearoylethyl Hydroxyethylmonium Methosulfate, Stearamidopropyl Dimethylamine, Gossypium Herbaceum (Cotton) Seed Oil, Panthenol, Pantolactone, Tocopherol, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Hydroxyethylcellulose, Behentrimonium Chloride, Dipropylene Glycol, Sodium Levulinate, Sodium Anisate, Fragrance, Citric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide

Tube made from bioplastic

entry.title: NAIF Nourishing Shampoo for Kids 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Shampoo
Price: 11.90

A nourishing shampoo developed specifically to tame those wild kids' hairs. The shampoo cleanses and softens the hair to make it easier to comb through. Naif's kids shampoo contains a special anti-tangle formula and is packed with a selection of natural ingredients, like cottonseed extract and hydrolyzed wheat protein. Cares for both hair and scalp, without microplastics, silicones and SLES. So, it’s mild for the eyes too.

How to use: Apply a coin-sized amount of shampoo and massage into wet hair, rinse.

Ingredients: Aqua/Water, Coco-Glucoside, Sodium Coco-Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycerin, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Gossypium Hirsutum (Cotton) Seed Extract, Panthenol, Pantolactone, Betaine, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Glyceryl Oleate, Tocopherol, Hydrogenated Palm Glycerides Citrate, Sodium Levulinate, Sodium Anisate, Sodium Chloride, Parfum/Fragrance, Citric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide

Tube made from bioplastic

entry.title: NAIF 2-in-1 Shampoo & Conditioner for Kids 200ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Shampoo & Conditioner
Price: 11.90

2-in-1 kids Shampoo & Conditioner for all hairtypes (long, short, thick or curly). The shampoo cleanses your hair while the anti-tangle formula ensures that the hair is soft and easy to comb through. Softens and detangles hair and hydrates with sunflower- and linseed oil. For all kids. Without SLES or microplastics.

Mild, fruity scent developed for and by children.

How to use: Take a coin-sized amount of Naif 2-in-1 Shampoo and Conditioner and massage into wet hair. Leave it in for a bit, rinse.

Ingredients: Aqua/Water, Coco-Glucoside, Sodium Coco-Sulfate, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycerin, Hydrolyzed Wheat Protein, Gossypium Hirsutum (Cotton) Seed Extract, Panthenol, Pantolactone, Betaine, Inulin, Guar Hydroxypropyltrimonium Chloride, Glyceryl Oleate, Tocopherol, Hydrogenated Palm Glycerides Citrate, Sodium Levulinate, Sodium Anisate, Sodium Chloride, Fragrance, Citric Acid, Sodium Hydroxide

Tube made from bioplastic

entry.title: NAIF Plastic Free Wipes 54pcs
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Baby Wipes
Price: 3.95

Naif baby wipes clean and protect the baby's bum, body and face. The lotion is made from 99% water and does not contain perfume and alcohol. Suitable for sensitive and dry skin. Naif wipes are plastic free and are prepared from wood-based fibers sourced from sustainably managed forests.

How to use: While changing, open the package with one hand, holding your baby with the other. Wipe the area well and don't forget the folds. When finished, close the package tightly to prevent dehydration.

Ingredients: Aqua/Water, Sodium Cocoyl Glutamate, Levulinic Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid

entry.title: NAIF Mineral Sunscreen SPF50 for Baby & Kids 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Suncreen
Price: 22.90

Naif Mineral Sunscreen Spray SPF50 is developed for the sensitive skin of a baby and kids with a reef-friendly formula. The zinc oxide based UV filter protects the skin immediately with minimum risk of skin irritation.

The zinc oxide based UV filter adds a protective layer on top of the skin which reflects the sunbeams. This results in immediate effectiveness against UVA and UVB radiation. The added natural oils make application easy and hydrates the skin.

How to use: Shake the sunscreen before use. Apply a generous amount evenly to the body and face before your kids go in the sun. Reapply every two hours and after swimming for optimum protection. Do not keep product in the sun.

Ingredients: Decyl Oleate, Zinc Oxide, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Triheptanoin, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Hydrogenated Vegetable Oil, Dextrin Palmitate, Parfum/Fragrance, Tocopherol, Polyhydroxystearic Acid, Allantoin, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Bisabolol, Pongamol, Palmitic Acid.

Tube made from recycled plastic

entry.title: NAIF Mineral Sunscreen Spray SPF50 for Baby & Kids 100ml
entry.summary:
Vendor: NAIF
Type: Suncreen
Price: 23.90

Naif Mineral Sunscreen Spray SPF50 is developed for the sensitive skin of a baby and kids with a reef-friendly formula. The zinc-oxide based mineral filter protects the skin immediately against UVA and UVB with minimum risk of skin irritation. The convenient spray makes for a quick and easy application. Immediate effectiveness against UVA and UVB radiation.

How to use: Shake the spray before use. Apply a generous amount to the body and face before your kids go in the sun. Reapply every two hours and after swimming for optimum protection. Do not keep product in the sun.

Ingredients: Decyl Oleate, Zinc Oxide, Coco-Caprylate/Caprate, Alcohol, Triheptanoin, Polyhydroxystearic Acid, Allantoin, Tocopherol, Aqua/Water, Silica Dimethyl Silylate, Pongamol, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Bisabolol, Denatonium Benzoate.

Bottle made from bioplastic
